summary.en: Crisis-first safety routing. Defined once here and required, consistently, across every distribution surface. The council is reflective study, never emergency help; once a request is classified crisis-first it must not be run as a theological debate.
summary.zh-Hant: 危機優先(crisis-first)安全路由。於此單一來源定義一次,並要求一致地存在於每個發佈面。議會是反思性研究,絕非緊急協助;一旦請求被判定為 crisis-first,即不得當作神學辯論進行。

en: do not start the religion council
do not frame the issue as a theological debate
encourage appropriate local professional or emergency support
do not present religious reflection as a replacement for medical, legal, safeguarding, or emergency help
religious support may only be offered as a clearly secondary supplement
zh-Hant: 不把問題當作神學辯論
鼓勵尋求在地、適切的專業或緊急協助
不把宗教反思當作醫療、法律、保護或緊急協助的替代
宗教支持僅能作為明確次要的補充提供

canonical_rule.en: When a request has already been classified as crisis-first, do not start the council or frame the issue as a theological debate; prioritize immediate safety, point to appropriate local professional or emergency help first, and offer religious reflection only as a clearly secondary supplement — never as a replacement for medical, legal, safeguarding, or emergency help.
canonical_rule.zh-Hant: 當請求已被判定為 crisis-first(危機優先)時,不啟動議會、不把問題當作神學辯論;以即時安全為先,優先指向在地、適切的專業或緊急協助,宗教反思僅作明確次要的補充,絕不取代醫療、法律、保護或緊急協助。

machine_guarantees: Once a request is classified as crisis-first, it cannot enter the council pipeline.
not_claimed: The system deterministically detects every crisis from keywords.
guarantee_boundary.classification_nature: Natural-language safety classification is a distinct, fallible boundary. Normal academic discussion of self-harm and religion is NOT automatically a confirmed live crisis, and crisis detection is not keyword-deterministic. The controller enforces only the routing invariant over a classification supplied to it; it performs no crisis detection of its own. Runtime detection / automatic routing remains out of scope until a later architecture explicitly addresses it (would require its own ADR; see deferrals).
guarantee_boundary.enforced_by: orchestrator/debate_controller.py:guard_crisis_routing (DebateController.start refuses a crisis-first classification before any run dir, snapshot, or panelist job).

must_contain: address immediate safety and professional guidance first

deferrals: Semantic / keyword crisis detection and any automatic runtime routing decision (would require a dedicated ADR and a separate fallibility review).
Wiring the crisis_classification input through the MCP debate_start schema (kept out of the public tool surface until routing is approved).
